result:
All acceptance criteria verified empirically: anonymous request returns 403, authorized request returns exact `{"users":1,"nodes":13}` JSON matching DB counts with correct `application/json` Content-Type header (confirmed via full HTTP request, not just direct callback invocation), uses `drupal_json_output()` (native D7 mechanism, not print+exit), `php -l` passes, and code has proper doc comments/coding standards.

{"verdict": "approve", "reasons": ["Anonymous access correctly denied with HTTP 403", "Authorized request returns exact {\"users\":<int>,\"nodes\":<int>} shape, verified matching live DB counts (users=1, nodes=13)", "Content-Type is application/json via drupal_json_output(), D7 native delivery mechanism, no print+exit", "hook_permission defines 'view healthstats' and hook_menu wires access arguments correctly", "php -l passes; doc comments present on all hooks; coding standards followed", "healthstats.info left unmodified"]}
